历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including former Science Category) were 558 → 487 → 401 → 605 → 447 respectively, with significant fluctuations in the past five years. In 2023, it rose to a high of 401, dropped to 605 in 2024, and rebounded to 447 in 2025. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 447. The university's enrollment plan in Guangxi for Physics Category was 27 in 2021, 26 in 2022, 26 in 2023, 25 in 2024, and 14 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 14, unchanged from 2025. The 2025 plan significantly decreased from 25 to 14 compared to 2024, and remains low in 2026, indicating a tight competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it is approximately 17th, consistently among the top 20 nationally, belonging to the top-tier university level. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving public opinion related to teacher ethics and campus safety. Its Douyin popularity ranks 44th (relatively hot), with overall attention moderately high. No significant enrollment gaps have been observed. It has 15 disciplines rated A- or above, including Statistics A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Physics A-, and other strong science and engineering disciplines, which strongly attract Physics Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly recommended due to social popularity, while Artificial Intelligence should be approached with caution. In 2026, the total number of Guangxi college entrance examination candidates is approximately 392,000, an increase of about 3.3% from 2025 (approximately 379,600). Physics Category candidates, estimated at about 68% of the total, number approximately 266,600, an increase of about 2.4% from 2025 (260,400). The expansion of the candidate pool slightly intensifies competition. 7. [Location Factor] Renmin University of China is located in Beijing, a first-tier city university, which has a strong regional appeal to Guangxi candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant fluctuations in historical rankings (401–605), the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged from 2025 (14 students), a slight increase of about 2.4% in Physics Category candidates, a slightly negative but limited impact of the university's reputation, and the strong appeal of popular majors like Computer Science and Statistics to Physics Category candidates, the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is expected to move slightly forward from the baseline of 447. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 432, with a range of 380–484.
